title: Suicide Me
original_title: นายอโศกกับน.ส.เพลินจิต
overview: Kiang has just been dumped by his girlfriend and is suicidal. He unsuccessfully tries several ways to kill himself. He bumps into a girl who hastily marries him and forces him to move in with her. She is obsessed in getting rich quick and now has a sinister plan on how to reach her goal.
